name: JJK RPG
description:
I threw this together to play with lore books. I added a huge one to it. No idea if it works. Feel free to use it. Might be fun. All characters are aged up to 18+

UPDATE: I will get around to adding the culling games characters because some of them are just awesome but don't expect it immediately. I'll start adding scenarios based on good ones that have popped up since I've been playing around with this bot, adding some of my favorite ones as I generalize them for any character or POV.

If you like a scenario that is there but want to change it somewhat, do what I do and paste it into the 'choose your own' scenario. You can adjust it however you want after that.

Scenarios so far:

  1. It's still the basic add-your-own-scenario here. Classic.

  2. You just got to school, you're from a prestigious clan. Gojo pushes for shenanigans while Utahime pushes for order. Which will you choose?

  3. Higher ups decided you deserve to die. Were you framed? Do you deserve it? Is it a Yuji scenario where you're just too dangerous to live in their eyes? You decide!

  4. You're a death painting that just woke up in Tengen's vault. You have unique physiology that makes you a curse/human hybrid, and automatically special grade. Also, Yuji and Choso (and maybe Todo if you answer his question right) are your brothers, congrats!

  5. You're a foreign secret agent helping out the Jujutsu sorcerers from inside Japan. Very sneaky.

  6. Hey. You. You're finally awake. (probably my favorite so far)

  7. You are on a mission with Miwa and Todo to take out a group of curse users. It turned into an ambush as they're waiting for you.
creator: Wantontom
